description: A database administrator needs to check out the credentials for a privileged database account to perform maintenance.

nodes.task_description: Receive the administrator's request to check out the 'DB_Admin' credential, including a justification and ticket number.

expected_outcome.value: The PAM system receives the request.

nodes.task_description: The PAM system automatically releases the password to the administrator for a pre-defined time limit (e.g., 2 hours).

expected_outcome.value: The administrator receives the one-time password.

nodes.task_description: After the time limit expires, the PAM system automatically checks the credential back in and rotates the password.

expected_outcome.value: The one-time password is automatically invalidated, securing the account.
